steps.title: Split into two cases
steps.content:
The equation says $x-47$ is $1$ unit from $0$ in either direction. That gives one positive case and one negative case.
$$x-47=1\quad\text{or}\quad x-47=-1$$

steps.title: Find both solutions
steps.content:
Solve each equation by adding $47$ to both sides.
$$x=48\quad\text{or}\quad x=46$$

steps.title: Add the solutions
steps.content:
The graphs $y=(x-47)^2$ and $y=1$ intersect at the same two $x$-values. Add the solutions.
$$48+46=94$$
The answer is 94.
